hero.title: Chase the Sunrise, Meet the Ocean’s Spirit
hero.subtitle: Step aboard for an intimate encounter with Lovina's wild dolphins. A bespoke maritime adventure guided by local tradition and world-class hospitality.

hero.title: The Ultimate North Bali Expedition
hero.description: Witness the magic of dancing dolphins in Bali's northern waters, led by expert local navigators who know the sea by heart.

intro.title: Unveil the Secrets of the Bali Sea. Your Journey Into the Wild Starts Here.
intro.description: Welcome to Lovina Dolphin Port. We don’t just offer a boat ride; we provide a gateway to North Bali’s marine wonders. From the legendary golden sunrise dolphin tours to immersive snorkeling and deep-sea fishing expeditions, our mission is to create memories that last a lifetime with warmth and genuine Balinese charm.

contact.address: Lovina Beach, Spice Beach Club Area, Near Pepito Market, Kaliasem, Buleleng, Bali 81152

features.title: Expert Maritime Heritage
features.description: Captain Komang Redi carries a lifetime of seafaring wisdom. Friendly, skilled, and deeply connected to the Lovina tides.

features.title: The Golden Hour Safari
features.description: Set sail at 6:00 AM to witness dolphins in their natural playground as the sun breaks the horizon. A 3-hour pure magic journey.

features.title: Premium Safety Standard
features.description: Travel with peace of mind. Our traditional outriggers are modernized with full safety equipment for a secure family outing.

features.title: Seamless Arrival
features.description: Relax and let us handle the transport. Complimentary shuttle service for all guests staying within the Lovina heartland.

overview.title: The Experience
overview.description: Escape the ordinary and dive into the tranquil beauty of North Bali. Our tours offer a rare front-row seat to the graceful synchronized swimming of wild dolphins. Whether you’re seeking a romantic sunrise or a thrilling family discovery, we blend the raw beauty of nature with the comfort of professional guiding.
overview.note: Safety first: Tours are subject to favorable sea conditions and BMKG weather updates.

terms.title: Booking Essentials
steps: Reservations are required at least 24 hours in advance via WhatsApp.
Our rendezvous point is Lovina Central (near Pepito). Live location will be shared upon booking confirmation.
To secure your spot, please send proof of transfer (BRI or WISE). Alternative payments available upon request.
